## Type of Change

- [ ] New agent

## Checklist

- [ ] Agent follows the [frontmatter format](https://ultimate-ai-agents-docs.pages.dev/reference/agent-format)
- [ ] Ran `./generate-platforms.sh` if editing `agents/claude/`
- [ ] Ran `./generate-browser.sh` if editing `agents/claude/`
- [ ] Ran `./sync.sh` to verify local sync works
- [ ] No hardcoded agent/workflow counts in any file
- [ ] Tested install: `TOOLS=claude ./install.sh`
